protocol.name: tawc_gfxstream
protocol.description: Custom Vulkan WSI hand-off for the gfxstream backend. The chroot presents a gfxstream ColorBuffer id; the compositor resolves it to an AHardwareBuffer and reuses the android_wlegl texture import path. No fds are exchanged.

interface.name: tawc_gfxstream

description.summary: bind gfxstream ColorBuffer resources as wl_buffers

interface.description: Singleton global. Bound by the chroot's custom Vulkan WSI; not used by the libhybris path (which goes via android_wlegl instead).

entry.name: unknown_colorbuffer
entry.summary: colorbuffer_id is not present in gfxstream's FrameBuffer

entry.name: not_ahb_backed
entry.summary: colorbuffer_id resolved, but no AHardwareBuffer is attached

request.name: create_buffer

description.summary: bind a gfxstream ColorBuffer as a wl_buffer

request.description:
Create a wl_buffer backed by an existing gfxstream ColorBuffer identified by `colorbuffer_id`. The compositor acquires the underlying AHardwareBuffer and releases it on wl_buffer destruction.
Width, height, and format must match the ColorBuffer's actual dimensions and DRM_FOURCC encoding.
Errors: unknown_colorbuffer — `colorbuffer_id` is not currently registered with gfxstream's FrameBuffer. The client failed to allocate it, or already destroyed it. not_ahb_backed — the ColorBuffer exists but has no AHB backing.

request.name: destroy
request.description: The global itself is stateless; existing wl_buffers stay alive until they are destroyed.
